text:
There was a lonely bird. Every morning he would fly out of his old branch and visit the fields. There he flew into a hive of bees. They were angry that he talked. They made him buzz! They flew away and left him alone. Maybe they were boring.

One day he flew into a fox. The fox had fur like cotton. That's beautiful. Maybe they could be friends?

There they sat. The fox said, "I don't usually take birds." Maybe he liked birds. Perhaps that was nice.

The bird said, "Where do you come from?"

"A swamp."

That's nice. They talked all afternoon. By midnight, they flew back home. They were friends.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
